name: portfolio-monorepo
description: Portfolio with React frontend and NestJS backend

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && NODE_ENV=development npm run start -- --watch
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.seed: cd backend && NODE_ENV=development npm run seed
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:migrate:gen: cd backend && NODE_ENV=development npm run migration:generate -d src/data-source.ts
scripts.db:migrate:run: cd backend && NODE_ENV=development npm run migration:run -d src/data-source.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
